title: Forsaken Spawn Totem (Animated)
body:
hi forsaken spawn followers

you know what to do

currently not for all ver but prob might work on any just ignore incompatibility message

Also [black](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/forsaken-spawn-totem-(black)) and [white](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/forsaken-spawn-totem-(white)) ver!

![Oh give thanks to the Spawn, for he is good; for their steadfast love endures forever.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CbnmYVrE/images/cfabe7662c4ee7d7a84a68975b6e60b0b2462400.gif)
